epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Frailty phenotype or deficit accumulation indices; screening integrated in some primary care/geriatrics programs

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; frailty screening programs exist in some member states
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; improved with structured exercise/nutrition and deprescribing programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Geriatric assessment services common in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Multidomain interventions: resistance exercise, nutrition, medication review, and fall prevention
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Service variability and rising demand with aging
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established geriatric care pathways and social support services in many member states
